import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let len = string.len(trimmed)
  mut sp = -1
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    let b = string.byte_at(trimmed, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        if sp == -1
          sp = i
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sp == -1
    Err("no separator")
  else
    let a_str = string.trim(string.substring(trimmed, 0, sp))
    let b_str = string.trim(string.substring(trimmed, sp, len))
    let a = string.parse_int(a_str).ok_or("parse a")?
    let b = string.parse_int(b_str).ok_or("parse b")?
    let r = a * a + b * b
    print("r=#{r}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
